_how_to_use: This mirrors the editor's 'Sample Data' tab (Key / Type / Value rows).
For each entry in 'fields' below: click '+ Add Field', type the Key, pick the Type
from the dropdown (String / Number / Media), and set the Value. Then 'Generate JSON'.
These are the live User Data fields the script pushes. The STATIC 'Add Widget Preview'
fields are NOT entered here (those are Custom Strings set in that surface directly).
MEDIA fields here do NOT accept a URL: click 'Choose Image' and upload a local image
(use the included sample_album_art.png). This is PREVIEW-ONLY. The LIVE widget still
gets real album art from Spotify as a URL via the script (type 3 {url}) — URLs work live.
You don't need every field — only the Keys you actually used in Widget Top/Bottom.
Values here are just demo data so the preview renders; change them to anything.

fields.value: UPLOAD via 'Choose Image' -> sample_album_art.png  (no URL here; live art is a Spotify URL from the script)
You'd think at this point I've learned it's never that personal
I keep replaying every word you said
But I'm not gonna call you anymore
